issue.message: Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Very long vector path (3917 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.
This @Composable function emits content but doesn't have a modifier parameter.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#when-should-i-expose-modifier-parameters for more information.

Modifiers should only be used once and by the root level layout of a Composable. This is true even if appended to or with other modifiers e.g. modifier.fillMaxWidth().Use Modifier (with a capital 'M') to construct a new Modifier that you can pass to other composables.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#dont-re-use-modifiers for more information.

Modifiers should only be used once and by the root level layout of a Composable. This is true even if appended to or with other modifiers e.g. modifier.fillMaxWidth().Use Modifier (with a capital 'M') to construct a new Modifier that you can pass to other composables.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#dont-re-use-modifiers for more information.

Modifiers should only be used once and by the root level layout of a Composable. This is true even if appended to or with other modifiers e.g. modifier.fillMaxWidth().Use Modifier (with a capital 'M') to construct a new Modifier that you can pass to other composables.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#dont-re-use-modifiers for more information.

Modifiers should only be used once and by the root level layout of a Composable. Modifiers should only be used once and by the root level layout of a Composable. This is true even if appended to or with other modifiers e.g. modifier.fillMaxWidth().Use Modifier (with a capital 'M') to construct a new Modifier that you can pass to other composables.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#dont-re-use-modifiers for more information.

This @Composable function has a modifier parameter but it doesn't have a default value.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#modifiers-should-have-default-parameters for more information.
issue.errorLine1: internal fun LimitedFunctionalities(modifier: Modifier, dailySendingLimit: () -> String) {

issue.message: This @Composable function has a modifier parameter but it doesn't have a default value.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#modifiers-should-have-default-parameters for more information.

issue.errorLine1: private fun UpgradeFeatures(app: KSuiteApp, modifier: Modifier) {

issue.message: This @Composable function has a modifier parameter but it doesn't have a default value.See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#modifiers-should-have-default-parameters for more information.

Composable functions should only be emitting content into the composition from one source at their top level.
See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#do-not-emit-multiple-pieces-of-content for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, text: String, buttonText: String, onClick: () -> Unit] but should be [text: String, buttonText: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onClick: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.
issue.errorLine1: internal fun InformationBlock(modifier: Modifier = Modifier, text: String, buttonText: String, onClick: () -> Unit) {

issue.message: Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, @StringRes textRes: Int] but should be [@StringRes textRes: Int, modifier: Modifier = Modifier]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.
issue.errorLine1: private fun LimitedFunctionalityLabel(modifier: Modifier = Modifier, @StringRes textRes: Int) {

issue.message: Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, tier: MyKSuiteTier, @ColorInt backgroundColor: Int? = null] but should be [tier: MyKSuiteTier, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, @ColorInt backgroundColor: Int? = null]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.
issue.errorLine1: fun MyKSuiteChip(modifier: Modifier = Modifier, tier: MyKSuiteTier, @ColorInt backgroundColor: Int? = null) {

issue.message: Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, text: String, shape: Shape, onClick: () -> Unit] but should be [text: String, shape: Shape, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, onClick: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, title: String, value: String, valueStyle: TextStyle = Typography.bodyRegular] but should be [title: String, value: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, valueStyle: TextStyle = Typography.bodyRegular]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, app: KSuiteApp, sheetState: SheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true), onDismissRequest: () -> Unit] but should be [app: KSuiteApp, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, sheetState: SheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true), onDismissRequest: () -> Unit]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [modifier: Modifier = Modifier, text: String, icon: ImageVector, color: Color = Color.Unspecified, style: TextStyle, iconRightPadding: Dp = 0.dp, iconLine: Int = 0, iconTint: Color = Color.Black] but should be [text: String, icon: ImageVector, style: TextStyle, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, color: Color = Color.Unspecified, iconRightPadding: Dp = 0.dp, iconLine: Int = 0, iconTint: Color = Color.Black]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Parameters in a composable function should be ordered following this pattern: params without defaults, modifiers, params with defaults and optionally, a trailing function that might not have a default param. Current params are: [ColumnScope, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, customFeature: MyKSuiteUpgradeFeatures, iconSize: Dp = Dimens.iconSize, textColor: Color = Color.Unspecified] but should be [ColumnScope, customFeature: MyKSuiteUpgradeFeatures, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, iconSize: Dp = Dimens.iconSize, textColor: Color = Color.Unspecified]. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#ordering-composable-parameters-properly for more information.

Instance composable functions on non-stable classes will always be recomposed. If possible, make the receiver type stable or refactor this function if that isn't possible. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#unstable-receivers for more information.

Instance composable functions on non-stable classes will always be recomposed. If possible, make the receiver type stable or refactor this function if that isn't possible. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#unstable-receivers for more information.

Instance composable functions on non-stable classes will always be recomposed. If possible, make the receiver type stable or refactor this function if that isn't possible. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#unstable-receivers for more information.
issue.errorLine1: fun getColor() = if (this is Mail) LocalMyKSuiteColors.current.mail else LocalMyKSuiteColors.current.drive
